hero.subtitle: Clear profiles, practical matchmaking filters, one-to-one chat, and Russian patch coverage in one focused platform.

features.title: How the platform helps
features.f1_desc: Set your nickname, rank, roles, language, and region so others instantly see if your style matches.
features.f2_desc: Search players by rank, role, language, and region without guesswork.
features.f3_desc: Move from discovery to conversation directly, without losing context.
features.f4_desc: Follow Dota 2 updates in Russian quickly and in a readable format.

cta_section.title: Ready to find your team?
cta_section.subtitle: Create your profile and start finding teammates right now.

footer.desc: Platform for deaf and hard-of-hearing Dota 2 players.

seo.title: dotadeaf — Dota 2 for deaf players
seo.description: Find Dota 2 teammates. Built for deaf and hard-of-hearing players.
seo.patches_description: Russian-language Dota 2 patch notes and updates.

about.title: About the project
about.subtitle: Why we built dotadeaf
about.mission_text: dotadeaf is built for deaf and hard-of-hearing Dota 2 players who need teammates that understand their communication needs. We believe every player deserves a team where they feel comfortable.
about.problem_text: Standard player discovery does not account for communication differences. Deaf players often face misunderstandings in team play, and we are solving that gap.
about.v1_desc: Rank, roles, language, region, and play style - everything needed to choose the right teammate.
about.v2_desc: Search by relevant criteria without guesswork or awkward situations.
about.v3_desc: Move from discovery to direct communication while keeping context intact.
about.v4_desc: Follow Dota 2 updates in your native language clearly and quickly.
about.cta_text: Create a profile and find a team that understands you.

players_page.title: Players
players_page.subtitle: Find players using simple filters.
players_page.empty_desc: Try clearing some filters or broadening your search criteria.

player_filters.desc: Refine results by rank, role, language, region, and team status.

patches.title: Patches
patches.subtitle: Russian-language patch updates for dotadeaf users.
patches.lead_after: Use the full platform by finding teammates and completing your profile.
patches.empty_desc: Dota 2 updates in Russian will appear here soon.

auth_page.login_subtitle: Sign in to continue to your account.
auth_page.register_subtitle: Register to start building your player profile.

auth_form.invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth_form.registration_success: Account created. Please check your email to confirm registration.
auth_form.google_failed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

platform.footer_hint: Keep your profile up to date to improve player discovery and messaging.
platform.dashboard_subtitle: Welcome back. Continue from your profile, conversations, or player discovery.
platform.profile_incomplete: Your profile still needs required fields.
platform.profile_missing: Profile record was not loaded yet. Please try again.
platform.find_teammates_desc: Browse the public players page and apply role-based filters.
platform.messages_desc: Continue your one-to-one conversations in the messages area.
platform.patch_updates_desc: Read published Russian-language Dota 2 patch content.
platform.messages_subtitle: Select a conversation to view messages.
platform.open_conversation_desc: Choose a conversation from the list above to read and send messages.
platform.open_conversation_hint: No conversations yet? Find players on the public listing and start from there.
platform.conversation_subtitle: Read the thread and continue messaging.
platform.profile_unavailable: Your profile data is not available yet.
platform.profile_setup: Please complete your profile to continue.
platform.profile_actions_desc: Keep your profile current so other players can find you more easily.
platform.settings_subtitle: Settings are intentionally minimal in MVP. Use profile editing for core account data.
platform.available_desc: Profile details, rank, preferred roles, language, region, and availability are managed on the profile edit page.
platform.edit_validation_error: Please correct the highlighted profile fields and try again.
platform.edit_save_error: Profile could not be saved. Please try again.
